title: Heritage Discovery
description: Visitor discovers Úbeda's UNESCO status, then drills into a specific monument on the main square, then asks about dining nearby.

turns.question: Why is Úbeda a UNESCO World Heritage City and what is the most famous square?
You mentioned the Plaza Vázquez de Molina — what specific monuments surround it? Tell me about the Sacred Chapel of El Salvador.
After visiting the chapel, I'd like to eat nearby. Are there any restaurants or cafes close to that square?

title: Gastronomy Deep Dive
description: Visitor interested in olive oil explores local production, gets details on a specific mill, then asks about accommodation.

turns.question: Is Úbeda known for olive oil? What can I visit related to local olive oil production?
You mentioned Almazara Baltasar Lara — where exactly is it located and what does it offer to visitors?
After visiting the oil mill, I need somewhere to stay overnight. What accommodation is available near the old town?

title: Practical City Planning
description: Visitor plans logistics: parking, then health services if needed, then picks up a tourist information guide.

turns.question: I'm driving to Úbeda. Where can I park my car near the historic centre?
Good. And just in case — if I need a pharmacy while I'm there, where can I find one close by?
Is there a tourist information office in Úbeda where I can get maps and book guided tours?

title: Full Day Itinerary
description: Visitor plans a full day: morning culture route, deep-dive on one monument mentioned in the answer, afternoon events.

turns.question: I have one full day in Úbeda. Suggest a morning cultural route covering the most important heritage sites.
You mentioned the Hospital de Santiago in your route — can you tell me more about it specifically? What is its history and what can I see inside?
What traditional festivals or cultural events take place in Úbeda that I might catch during my visit?
